calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Mutual Release Of Claim
Off Calendar Jun-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Moris Davidovitz and Daniel Conrad for and with Mark Walther and also for John McKinley; Elizabeth Anderson for Teresita Ravetti.

Responding to the Court's inquiry as to whether everyone was aware of any objection to the approval of the settlement, Mr. Davidovitz stated that his office has been in communication with all of the beneficiaries and that he was aware of no objection by anyone to the proposed settlement and proposed order. All counsel agree that there are no other issues pending at this time. The Court granted the petition for approval of the settlement agreement, subject to review of the order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
